nakshatras.name: Ashwini
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Pioneer energy. Quick, impatient, healing ability. Starts many things but struggles with completion. Natural physician and helper. Needs to learn patience and follow-through.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Learn to complete what you begin. Your healing gift is most powerful when grounded.
nakshatras.shadow: Restlessness, impatience, inability to commit
nakshatras.gifts: Healing, pioneering, quick action, enthusiasm
nakshatras.career: Medicine, emergency services, sports, military, pioneering ventures

nakshatras.name: Bharani
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Transformer. Carries life and death energy, intense creativity, and the power to create and destroy. Deeply responsible and disciplined. Understands cycles of birth and death.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Use your extraordinary power responsibly. You carry more than most.
nakshatras.shadow: Over-burdened, controlling, unable to release
nakshatras.gifts: Transformation, raw creativity, responsibility, artistic intensity
nakshatras.career: Art, occult, midwifery, mortuary, transformation professions

nakshatras.name: Krittika
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Purifier. Sharp and incisive, cuts through illusion with precision. Protective of those they love. Can be too critical. The fire that both destroys and nurtures.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Channel your sharp discernment constructively. Be the warmth of fire, not just its blade.
nakshatras.shadow: Excessive criticism, aggression, difficulty accepting imperfection
nakshatras.gifts: Discernment, protection, clarity, nurturing through challenge
nakshatras.career: Military, surgery, cooking, metallurgy, spiritual fire rituals

nakshatras.name: Rohini
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Sensual creator. Moon's favorite nakshatra. Deeply attached, magnetic, stubborn, luxurious. Natural artist and sensory connoisseur. Can be possessive.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Non-possessiveness. Learn to love without clinging. Your beauty is most radiant when free.
nakshatras.shadow: Jealousy, possessiveness, materialism, attachment
nakshatras.gifts: Beauty, magnetism, creativity, sensory intelligence, abundance
nakshatras.career: Arts, music, beauty industry, luxury goods, real estate

nakshatras.name: Mrigashira
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Eternal seeker. Curious, restless, always searching for the perfect — the perfect place, partner, idea. Sensitive and gentle. Must learn that peace is found within, not in the next pursuit.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: The deer you seek is within you. Rest in the perfection of now.
nakshatras.shadow: Restlessness, indecision, constantly seeking 'better'
nakshatras.gifts: Curiosity, research, sensitivity, adaptability, charm
nakshatras.career: Research, travel, writing, nature, astrology, meditation

nakshatras.name: Ardra
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Storm-bringer. Intense inner life, destructive-creative cycle. Experiences profound grief that leads to transformation. Brilliant but volatile mind. The diamond forged under extreme pressure.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Your grief is your greatest teacher. The storm you carry can become the rain that brings life.
nakshatras.shadow: Destruction, cruelty, extremes, difficulty with stability
nakshatras.gifts: Intellectual brilliance, depth, transformation, research, innovation
nakshatras.career: Science, technology, research, psychology, storm-weathering professions

nakshatras.name: Punarvasu
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Restorer. Optimistic, philosophical, returns from loss with renewed vigor. The phoenix who rises again and again. Believes in second chances. Naturally philosophical.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Trust the cycle of renewal. Every return is a rebirth, not a defeat.
nakshatras.shadow: Can get lost in philosophy, avoids harsh realities
nakshatras.gifts: Optimism, renewal, philosophy, wisdom, flexibility
nakshatras.career: Teaching, philosophy, spirituality, counseling, travel

nakshatras.name: Pushya
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Nurturer. Disciplined, traditional, sustains and nourishes others. Excellent at maintaining and preserving. Can sacrifice their own needs. One of the most auspicious nakshatras.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Learn to receive nourishment as freely as you give it. Your wellbeing matters.
nakshatras.shadow: Self-sacrificing to excess, rigid traditions, inability to receive
nakshatras.gifts: Nurturing, wisdom, sustaining, ritual, community care
nakshatras.career: Social work, spiritual leadership, education, nutrition, temples

nakshatras.name: Ashlesha
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Mystic. Penetrating intelligence, serpent wisdom, hypnotic quality. Can see through illusions. Must choose healing over manipulation as the use of power.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Your penetrating wisdom is a gift for healing. Use it to uplift, not control.
nakshatras.shadow: Manipulation, deception, using intelligence for selfish ends
nakshatras.gifts: Penetrating insight, healing ability, kundalini energy, occult knowledge
nakshatras.career: Medicine, psychology, occult, investigation, writing, politics

nakshatras.name: Magha
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Royal. Connected to ancestors, leadership, pride, and deep heritage. Natural authority. Must honor lineage without ego inflation. Ketu brings both spiritual depth and sudden losses.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: True royalty serves. Honor your ancestors through virtuous action, not pride.
nakshatras.shadow: Arrogance, excessive pride, attachment to status
nakshatras.gifts: Leadership, authority, ancestral wisdom, generosity, dignity
nakshatras.career: Politics, management, royalty, religious leadership, ancestral healing

nakshatras.name: Purva Phalguni
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Lover. Pleasure-seeking, creative, generous, charming. Deeply enjoys life's gifts — beauty, love, luxury. Can become too indulgent or avoid depth.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Depth beneath pleasure. The greatest joy comes from love that transforms you.
nakshatras.shadow: Hedonism, avoiding difficult emotions, vanity
nakshatras.gifts: Joy, creativity, love, charm, artistic expression
nakshatras.career: Entertainment, arts, luxury goods, romance, beauty

nakshatras.name: Uttara Phalguni
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Benefactor. Service-oriented, patronage, contracts and agreements. Deeply loyal. Balances pleasure with responsibility. Natural social connector.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Balance giving with boundaries. Your generosity is most powerful when sustainable.
nakshatras.shadow: Over-giving, difficulty receiving, martyrdom
nakshatras.gifts: Service, contracts, loyalty, social harmony, patronage
nakshatras.career: Law, contracts, social services, management, marriage counseling

nakshatras.name: Hasta
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Craftsperson. Skilled hands, sharp humor, powerful ability to manifest through skill. Practical and dexterous. The surgeon, the artist, the craftsperson.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Use your exceptional craft in service of truth and beauty, not just cleverness.
nakshatras.shadow: Trickery, using hands for deception, scattered skills
nakshatras.gifts: Dexterity, craftsmanship, humor, manifestation, healing hands
nakshatras.career: Surgery, arts and crafts, massage, astrology, carpentry

nakshatras.name: Chitra
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Architect. Brilliant, aesthetic, designer of realities. Attracted to beauty, symmetry, and excellence. Creates the new. Must ensure beauty has substance.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Beauty with depth and truth is your highest creation.
nakshatras.shadow: Obsession with appearances, ego around creative work
nakshatras.gifts: Aesthetic mastery, architecture, design, brilliance, attraction
nakshatras.career: Architecture, fashion, design, jewelry, visual arts, construction

nakshatras.name: Swati
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Independent. Flexible, diplomatic, deeply needs personal freedom. Like the wind — bends without breaking. Must develop roots that allow movement.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: True freedom comes from inner rootedness, not escape from commitment.
nakshatras.shadow: Restlessness, non-commitment, using diplomacy to avoid truth
nakshatras.gifts: Flexibility, diplomacy, independence, adaptability, business
nakshatras.career: Business, diplomacy, trade, freedom-based work, travel

nakshatras.name: Vishakha
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Achiever. Driven, goal-oriented, single-minded in pursuit of objectives. Can be aggressive in pursuit. Must learn patience and grace on the journey.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: The path is as important as the destination. Arrive with your integrity intact.
nakshatras.shadow: Obsessive goal-pursuit, jealousy, difficulty with second place
nakshatras.gifts: Focus, determination, leadership, achievement, strength
nakshatras.career: Politics, athletics, military, business, spiritual achievement

nakshatras.name: Anuradha
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Devotee. Loyal, occult knowledge, devoted friendships that transcend the ordinary. Deep emotional bonds. Must practice devotion without possessiveness.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Devotion without attachment is divine love. Your friendships are sacred contracts.
nakshatras.shadow: Possessiveness in friendships, too much loyalty to wrong people
nakshatras.gifts: Loyalty, occult knowledge, friendship, devotion, research
nakshatras.career: Occult, friendship-based work, foreign countries, investigation, healing

nakshatras.name: Jyeshtha
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Elder. Protective, leadership, intense, the eldest sibling archetype. Feels responsible for all. Must not cross from protection into manipulation.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: True power serves without controlling. Lead through love, not domination.
nakshatras.shadow: Manipulation, martyrdom, using intelligence for control
nakshatras.gifts: Leadership, protection, intelligence, mystical knowledge, authority
nakshatras.career: Leadership, occult, management, politics, elder care

nakshatras.name: Moola
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Researcher. Rootless, philosophical, destructs to rebuild from the deepest foundation. Connected to ancestral roots and past lives. Must trust the uprooting.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Trust the dissolution. What falls away was not your true root. The real you goes deeper.
nakshatras.shadow: Destructive without purpose, disconnection from family
nakshatras.gifts: Research, philosophy, root-finding, healing the ancestral line
nakshatras.career: Research, philosophy, medicine (roots/herbs), ancestral healing, spirituality

nakshatras.name: Purva Ashadha
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Invincible. Proud, passionate, makes declarations of victory. Deeply purifying. Like water — persistent, unstoppable. Must balance pride with humility.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: True invincibility comes from purity of purpose, not from ego's declaration.
nakshatras.shadow: Pride, inability to admit defeat, self-righteousness
nakshatras.gifts: Passion, invincibility spirit, purification, enthusiasm, courage
nakshatras.career: Water industry, philosophy, debate, sports, arts

nakshatras.name: Uttara Ashadha
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Universal sage. Deep integrity, final victory through patience and perseverance. Universal in compassion. Must endure without compromising core values.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Final victory belongs to those who maintain integrity through the longest darkness.
nakshatras.shadow: Rigidity, inability to adapt, all-or-nothing thinking
nakshatras.gifts: Integrity, universal service, endurance, deep wisdom, final victory
nakshatras.career: Law, universal service, politics, spiritual leadership, long-term projects

nakshatras.name: Shravana
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Listener. Learning, preservation of tradition, deep listening ability. Hears what others miss. Connected to sound, music, and the wisdom passed through lineages.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Wisdom comes first through deep listening — to tradition, to teachers, to the subtle voice within.
nakshatras.shadow: Gossip, too much information gathering without integration
nakshatras.gifts: Listening, learning, preservation, tradition, music, Vishnu's grace
nakshatras.career: Music, teaching, preservation of knowledge, counseling, temples

nakshatras.name: Dhanishtha
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Abundance. Musical, rhythmic, prosperous, generous. The prosperity that flows when aligned with cosmic rhythm. Must share abundance freely to keep it flowing.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Abundance is a rhythm — it must flow in and out freely to continue growing.
nakshatras.shadow: Miserliness despite prosperity, discord in partnerships
nakshatras.gifts: Music, rhythm, abundance, prosperity, generosity, energy
nakshatras.career: Music, wealth management, real estate, community, athletics

nakshatras.name: Shatabhisha
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Healer. Solitary, scientific, 100 physicians energy. Works alone in the cosmic ocean of healing. Must heal oneself before healing others.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: The circle is empty to be filled with healing. Heal yourself first — then 100 can be cured.
nakshatras.shadow: Isolation, secretiveness, healing others while neglecting self
nakshatras.gifts: Healing, research, solitude, scientific mind, cosmic vision
nakshatras.career: Medicine, research, astrology, energy healing, technology

nakshatras.name: Purva Bhadrapada
nakshatras.symbol: Front legs of funeral cot/two-faced man
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Visionary. Fierce idealism, transforms through intensity, sees beyond conventions. Must ground visions in reality or they consume the visionary.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Your visions are sacred — ground them in practical action or they remain dreams.
nakshatras.shadow: Extremism, idealism disconnected from reality, self-destructiveness
nakshatras.gifts: Vision, idealism, transformation, passion, spiritual intensity
nakshatras.career: Spiritual teaching, writing, healing, visionary arts

nakshatras.name: Uttara Bhadrapada
nakshatras.symbol: Back legs of funeral cot/serpent in water
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Sage. Deep wisdom from the depths, serpent wisdom, extraordinary patience. Like a deep-sea creature — still, wise, ancient. Must share depth rather than remain hidden.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Depth over breadth. Your ancient wisdom is needed on the surface.
nakshatras.shadow: Excessive isolation, withdrawing from the world
nakshatras.gifts: Depth, patience, ancient wisdom, healing, sacrifice
nakshatras.career: Spiritual teaching, deep research, healing, philosophy, ashram

nakshatras.name: Revati
nakshatras.psychological_profile: Completion. Compassionate, nurturing, end of the great cycle. The last nakshatra — both ending and beginning. Carries the compassion of completion. Must release and trust new beginnings.
nakshatras.soul_lesson: Release with love. Every ending is a compassionate gateway to a new beginning.
nakshatras.shadow: Difficulty moving forward, stuck in endings, over-nurturing
nakshatras.gifts: Compassion, safe passage, completion, nurturing, cosmic travel
nakshatras.career: Music, art, nursing, animal care, spiritual guidance, travel
